info.title: Dermatolog Pro self-hosted API
info.description: Stage 4P self-hosted operations runtime checks for the full frontend/backend/PostgreSQL/object-storage product.

get.summary: Return safe self-hosted runtime operations checks
get.description: System-admin only endpoint. Returns database connectivity, backend-owned object storage status, migration bundle status, and dry-run operations commands without tokens, patient names, object keys, storage paths, or raw environment values.

403.description: Only system_admin can view operations runtime checks
